capabilities.capability_description: End-to-end lending from origination to servicing
Assessment, decisioning and approval of new loan applications
Ongoing management of active loan accounts
Calculation of borrower capacity to service a loan
Foundational banking ledger, accounts and payments
Creation, maintenance and closure of customer accounts
NPP, BPAY, direct entry and international payments
Customer-facing digital channels — web, mobile, broker portal
Internet banking for retail and business customers
Third-party broker submission and tracking platform
Enterprise data platform, reporting, and AI/ML capabilities
CDR data sharing with accredited data recipients
CRM, identity, and customer lifecycle management

solutions.title: Horizon Serviceability Engine
solutions.business_context: Centralised Azure-based serviceability calculation engine replacing fragmented Excel and online banking calculators. Provides consistent credit policy enforcement across all Horizon Bank brands and broker channels.
solutions.scope_inclusions: Centralised rules engine; Admin UI; Broker-facing calculator UI; Online banking integration; API publication
solutions.scope_exclusions: Legacy BSC decommission (separate project); Mobile app integration (Phase 2)
solutions.scope_backlog: Save/retrieve broker calculations; Credit policy simulation tool
solutions.mermaid_component:
graph LR
  Broker[Broker Portal] --> AFD[Azure Front Door]
  POL[Online Banking] --> AFD
  AFD --> APIM[Azure APIM]
  APIM --> SVC[Serviceability Engine\nAzure Functions]
  SVC --> DB[(Azure SQL\nRules Engine)]
  SVC --> KV[Key Vault]
  AdminUI[Admin UI] --> APIM
  APIM --> MON[Azure Monitor]
solutions.mermaid_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Broker->>AFD: Submit serviceability request
  AFD->>APIM: Forward (WAF validated)
  APIM->>SVC: Invoke calculation API
  SVC->>DB: Fetch current credit policy rules
  DB-->>SVC: Policy rules returned
  SVC->>SVC: Execute serviceability calculation
  SVC-->>APIM: Return calculation result
  APIM-->>Broker: JSON response with servicing capacity
solutions.target_disposition_rationale: Strategic platform — continues to evolve with credit policy changes

solutions.title: Horizon Open Banking CDR Platform
solutions.business_context: Consumer Data Right (CDR) data holder capability enabling accredited third parties to access Horizon Bank customer banking data via BIZA-registered APIs. Required for ACCC CDR compliance.
solutions.scope_inclusions: BIZA CDR Register integration; Azure Entra CDR auth server; APIM CDR API gateway; Consent management; CDS Banking APIs v1.31
solutions.scope_exclusions: Energy sector CDR; Business banking CDR (Phase 2)
solutions.mermaid_component:
graph LR
  Consumer --> DR[Accredited DR App]
  DR --> BIZA[BIZA CDR Register]
  DR --> AFD[Azure Front Door]
  AFD --> APIM[Azure APIM]
  APIM --> Entra[Entra External ID\nCDR Auth Server]
  APIM --> CDR[CDR API Functions]
  CDR --> SQL[(Azure SQL\nCDR Cache)]
  CDR --> Cosmos[(Cosmos DB\nConsent Store)]
  CDR --> Core[Core Banking]
solutions.mermaid_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  DR->>BIZA: Validate accreditation (SSA)
  DR->>AFD: PAR + consent request (MTLS)
  AFD->>APIM: Route request
  APIM->>Entra: OIDC auth flow
  Entra->>Consumer: Redirect to bank login
  Consumer->>Entra: Authenticate and grant consent
  Entra-->>DR: Issue access token
  DR->>APIM: CDR API call (Bearer token)
  APIM->>CDR: Invoke CDR handler
  CDR->>Core: Fetch customer data
  CDR-->>DR: Return CDR response

solutions.title: Architecture as Data — Intelligence Platform
solutions.business_context: Replaces legacy EA repository as the enterprise architecture system of record. Architecture knowledge captured as structured schema. AI agents handle intake and generation. Live estate intelligence for CTO and board.
solutions.scope_inclusions: Dataverse schema; Copilot Studio intake agent; Generation agent; Power Automate flows; Confluence publish; Mermaid diagram generation; Power BI estate dashboard
solutions.scope_exclusions: Legacy EA tool decommission (follows PoC validation); Visio licence retirement
solutions.scope_backlog: Lifecycle agent; Insights agent; Ingestion agent
solutions.mermaid_component:
graph LR
  Arch[Architect] --> Teams[Microsoft Teams]
  Teams --> Intake[Intake Agent\nCopilot Studio]
  Intake --> DV[(Dataverse\nSolution Record)]
  DV --> PA[Power Automate]
  PA --> Gen[Generation Agent]
  Gen --> DV
  PA --> Conf[Confluence Page]
  PA --> PBI[Power BI Dashboard]
solutions.mermaid_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Architect->>Intake Agent: Initiates intake in Teams
  Intake Agent->>Architect: Structured interview questions
  Architect->>Intake Agent: Provides answers
  Intake Agent->>Dataverse: Write solution_record
  Dataverse->>Power Automate: Trigger on intake_complete
  Power Automate->>Generation Agent: Request HLSO draft
  Generation Agent->>Dataverse: Write draft and Mermaid markup
  Power Automate->>Confluence: Publish HLSO page
  Architect->>Confluence: Review and refine draft

solutions.title: Broker Portal — New Experience
solutions.business_context: Modern Azure-hosted broker portal replacing the legacy Siebel-based broker interface. Provides loan submission, tracking, and serviceability access for accredited brokers across both Horizon Bank brands.
solutions.scope_inclusions: Broker authentication; Loan submission; Application tracking; Serviceability calculator integration; Document upload
solutions.mermaid_component:
graph LR
  Broker --> AFD[Azure Front Door]
  AFD --> APIM[Azure APIM]
  APIM --> Auth[Entra External ID]
  APIM --> LOS[Loan Origination Service]
  APIM --> SVC[Serviceability Engine\nSOL001]
  LOS --> Pega[Pega Platform]
  LOS --> SQL[(Azure SQL)]
solutions.mermaid_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Broker->>AFD: Login request
  AFD->>Entra: OIDC authentication
  Entra-->>Broker: Access token
  Broker->>APIM: Submit loan application
  APIM->>LOS: Create application
  LOS->>Pega: Initiate workflow
  Pega-->>LOS: Application reference
  LOS-->>Broker: Submission confirmed

solutions.title: Enterprise Data Hub
solutions.business_context: Centralised Snowflake-based data platform replacing fragmented on-premises data warehouses. Enables AI/ML workloads, regulatory reporting, and cross-brand analytics for Horizon Bank.
solutions.scope_inclusions: Snowflake cloud DW; Azure Data Factory ingestion; Power BI reporting layer; Data governance catalogue
solutions.scope_backlog: Data mesh domain ownership; Feature store for ML
solutions.mermaid_component:
graph LR
  Core[Core Banking\nTemenos] --> ADF[Azure Data Factory]
  CRM[Salesforce CRM] --> ADF
  Lending[Pega Lending] --> ADF
  ADF --> Snow[(Snowflake\nEnterprise DH)]
  Snow --> PBI[Power BI]
  Snow --> ML[ML Workbench]
  Snow --> Reg[Regulatory Reporting]
solutions.mermaid_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Core Banking->>ADF: Nightly extract (CDC)
  Salesforce->>ADF: Daily sync
  ADF->>Snowflake: Load and transform
  Snowflake->>Power BI: Refresh datasets
  Analyst->>Power BI: Query dashboards
  Power BI-->>Analyst: Return results
solutions.data_residency: Australia East (GCP/Snowflake) — data residency exception approved
solutions.target_disposition_rationale: Central intelligence platform for the enterprise

solutions.title: Customer Identity Platform
solutions.business_context: Unified customer identity and access management across all Horizon Bank digital channels using Azure Entra External ID. Replaces fragmented brand-specific identity stores across Coastal and Summit brands.
solutions.scope_inclusions: Azure Entra External ID; MFA; OIDC/OAuth2; Cross-brand SSO; Migration of Coastal and Summit identities
solutions.scope_exclusions: Staff identity (separate Entra ID tenant); Wholesale banking
solutions.mermaid_component:
graph LR
  Coastal[Coastal Online Banking] --> Entra[Azure Entra\nExternal ID]
  Summit[Summit Digital] --> Entra
  Broker[Broker Portal] --> Entra
  CDR[CDR Auth Server] --> Entra
  Entra --> IdStore[(Identity Store)]
  Entra --> MFA[MFA Provider]
  Entra --> KV[Key Vault]
solutions.mermaid_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Customer->>Coastal Portal: Login request
  Coastal Portal->>Entra: OIDC authorize
  Entra->>Customer: MFA challenge
  Customer->>Entra: MFA verified
  Entra-->>Coastal Portal: ID token and access token
  Coastal Portal->>API: Authenticated request
  API-->>Customer: Personalised content
solutions.target_disposition_rationale: Foundation identity platform — all channels depend on it

solutions.title: Payments Modernisation — Real-Time NPP
solutions.business_context: New Payments Platform (NPP) infrastructure uplift to support PayTo and Osko for retail and business customers across both Horizon Bank brands. Required for RBA NPP mandate compliance.
solutions.scope_inclusions: PayTo mandate initiation; Osko overlay; NPP gateway integration; Core banking adapter
solutions.scope_exclusions: International payments; Batch direct entry replacement
solutions.mermaid_component:
graph LR
  Customer --> OB[Online Banking]
  OB --> APIM[Azure APIM]
  APIM --> PaySvc[Payments Service\nAzure Functions]
  PaySvc --> Core[Temenos Transact]
  PaySvc --> NPP[NPP Gateway]
  NPP --> RBA[RBA Fast Settlement]
  PaySvc --> SB[Azure Service Bus]
  SB --> Notif[Notification Service]
solutions.mermaid_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Customer->>Online Banking: Initiate PayTo payment
  Online Banking->>APIM: Payment request
  APIM->>PaySvc: Process payment
  PaySvc->>Core: Debit source account
  PaySvc->>NPP: Submit to NPP gateway
  NPP->>RBA: Fast settle
  RBA-->>NPP: Settlement confirmation
  NPP-->>PaySvc: Payment confirmed
  PaySvc->>SB: Publish payment event
  SB->>Notif: Trigger customer notification

solutions.title: Fraud Detection AI Engine
solutions.business_context: Real-time ML-based transaction fraud detection replacing the legacy rule-based system. Reduces false positives by 40% while improving fraud catch rate using Azure ML and streaming analytics.
solutions.scope_inclusions: Azure ML model training pipeline; Real-time scoring via Azure Functions; Case management integration; Model monitoring dashboard
solutions.mermaid_component:
graph LR
  TxnStream[Transaction Stream] --> EG[Azure Event Grid]
  EG --> Score[Scoring Function\nAzure Functions]
  Score --> Model[Azure ML\nFraud Model]
  Score --> Rules[Rules Engine]
  Score --> Case[Case Management]
  Model --> Monitor[Model Monitor\nAzure Monitor]
  Case --> Analyst[Fraud Analyst]
solutions.mermaid_sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Core Banking->>Event Grid: Transaction event
  Event Grid->>Scoring Function: Invoke scorer
  Scoring Function->>Azure ML: Score transaction
  Azure ML-->>Scoring Function: Fraud probability
  Scoring Function->>Rules Engine: Apply business rules
  Rules Engine-->>Scoring Function: Decision
  Scoring Function->>Case Mgmt: Create case if fraud
  Case Mgmt->>Analyst: Alert notification

graph LR

  Siebel --> SQL[(On-prem SQL Server)]
solutions.target_disposition_rationale: Replaced by Salesforce CRM (SOL010). Full data migration in progress.

solutions.scope_inclusions: Sales Cloud; Service Cloud; Marketing Cloud; MuleSoft integration; Migration from Siebel

PoC phase — target ADA submission April 2026
GCP data residency exception approved — Snowflake AU region confirmed
TFDA in progress — AA required for NPP gateway vendor selection

lifecycle_flags.itpha_finding: AI model governance framework not yet documented
Critical: Vendor EOL Dec 2025. Data migration to Salesforce must complete by Jun 2026.
MuleSoft integration pattern pending formal approval
Critical: Vendor support ends Jun 2026. Migration to Azure APIM in progress.

decision_log.decision_text: Adopt Azure Functions (serverless) over Azure App Service for the calculation engine
decision_log.rationale: Serverless provides cost-efficient scaling for variable broker calculation load. No persistent state required.

decision_log.decision_text: Azure SQL over Cosmos DB for rules storage
decision_log.rationale: Credit policy rules are relational and structured. SQL provides ACID guarantees needed for policy enforcement. Cosmos DB overhead not justified.

decision_log.decision_text: Azure Entra External ID as CDR-compliant authorisation server
decision_log.rationale: Entra supports OIDC, FAPI 1.0 Advanced, PAR, DCR natively. Avoids build of custom auth server. Stays within M365 security perimeter.

decision_log.decision_text: Cosmos DB for consent store over SQL
decision_log.rationale: Consent arrangements have flexible schema and high read throughput requirements. Cosmos DB provides globally distributed, low-latency reads.

decision_log.decision_text: Dataverse as schema-first system of record replacing the legacy EA repository
decision_log.rationale: Dataverse is native to M365, has a relational model, native Power BI connector, and audit trail. Zero additional licensing. Legacy tool is SaaS with limited query capability.
decision_log.risk: Low — PoC required before full commitment

decision_log.decision_text: Mermaid.js over Visio for diagram generation
decision_log.rationale: Mermaid markup is text-based and generatable by AI agents from schema fields. No file attachments, no diagram drift. Rendered natively in Power Pages and Confluence.
decision_log.risk: Low — diagrams are less rich than Visio but fit-for-purpose

decision_log.decision_text: Snowflake on GCP over Azure Synapse
decision_log.rationale: Snowflake provides superior data sharing, cross-cloud querying, and separation of compute and storage. AA assessed three options — Snowflake scored highest on all guardrails.
decision_log.risk: Medium — GCP data residency requires CISO exception

decision_log.decision_text: Azure ML over third-party fraud ML platform
decision_log.rationale: Azure ML keeps data within the bank Azure tenancy. Avoids data egress to external ML vendor. Integrates natively with Azure Functions scoring pipeline.
decision_log.risk: High — model governance framework must be established before production

decision_log.decision_text: MuleSoft Anypoint for CRM integration layer
decision_log.rationale: Salesforce acquisition of MuleSoft provides native integration. Pre-built Temenos connector available.
decision_log.risk: High — MuleSoft not on approved components list. Under review for addition.

decision_log.decision_text: Single Entra External ID tenant for all brands (Coastal and Summit)
decision_log.rationale: Unified identity reduces operational overhead and enables cross-brand SSO. Brand separation maintained via custom domains and user flows.
decision_log.risk: Medium — brand isolation testing required before production

target_state_architecture.current_pattern: Fragmented: multiple point solutions per brand, Excel-based tools, limited API integration
target_state_architecture.target_pattern: Unified Azure-native lending platform: single serviceability engine, shared origination API, Pega workflow across both brands, broker-facing portal as first-class channel
target_state_architecture.target_principles: API-first; Azure-native; Approved components only; Single source of truth per data domain
target_state_architecture.rationale: Fragmented lending estate increases credit policy risk and broker experience friction. Unified platform reduces maintenance overhead and enables consistent policy enforcement.

target_state_architecture.current_pattern: Multiple on-premises data warehouses by brand. Limited cross-brand analytics. No ML capability in production.
target_state_architecture.target_pattern: Snowflake Enterprise Data Hub as single analytical layer. Azure Data Factory for ingestion. Power BI as enterprise reporting standard. ML workbench for predictive models.
target_state_architecture.target_principles: Cloud-native; Domain-oriented data ownership; AI-ready data foundations
target_state_architecture.rationale: Fragmented data estate limits analytics maturity and AI/ML adoption. Unified data hub enables cross-brand insights, regulatory reporting, and ML model development.

target_state_architecture.current_pattern: Oracle Siebel CRM (Coastal brand) plus fragmented Summit CRM tooling. No unified customer view. Limited marketing automation.
target_state_architecture.target_pattern: Salesforce CRM as single customer record across both brands. Service Cloud for contact centre. Marketing Cloud for campaigns. MuleSoft integration to core banking.
target_state_architecture.target_principles: SaaS-first; Single customer view; API-first integration
target_state_architecture.rationale: Siebel is end-of-life and inhibits customer experience investment. Salesforce provides modern CRM capability with AI features and native integration.

target_state_architecture.current_pattern: Rule-based fraud detection. Manual AML monitoring. Compliance coverage tracked in spreadsheets.
target_state_architecture.target_pattern: Azure ML-based fraud detection. Automated AML with graph analytics. Compliance programme tracked in real-time via Architecture as Data platform.
target_state_architecture.rationale: Rule-based risk systems are falling behind sophisticated fraud patterns. Compliance monitoring requires continuous oversight that manual processes cannot sustain.

target_state_architecture.current_pattern: Separate brand digital channels with independent tech stacks. No shared component library. Broker portal built on Siebel.
target_state_architecture.target_pattern: Shared Azure-native digital platform. Micro-frontend architecture with shared design system. Unified identity via Entra External ID. Modern broker portal as independent Azure SPA.
target_state_architecture.target_principles: API-first; Azure-native; Shared components; Design system
target_state_architecture.rationale: Fragmented digital channels increase cost, slow feature delivery, and create inconsistent customer experiences across Coastal and Summit brands.

roadmap_initiatives.description: Serviceability Engine deployment and legacy Excel calculator decommission. Replaces fragmented calculator estate.
roadmap_initiatives.benefits_description: Consistent serviceability outcomes; Excel decommission; 4-hour maintenance reduction per credit policy change

roadmap_initiatives.description: Modern Azure broker portal replacing Siebel-based legacy portal. Integrated with Serviceability Engine and Pega.
roadmap_initiatives.benefits_description: Modern broker experience; Channel uplift for 2900 brokers; Reduced submission errors

roadmap_initiatives.description: Snowflake EDH deployment. ADF ingestion from core banking, CRM, lending. Power BI reporting layer.
roadmap_initiatives.benefits_description: Unified analytics; Regulatory reporting uplift; ML foundation

roadmap_initiatives.description: Salesforce CRM implementation replacing Siebel across both brands. Includes data migration and MuleSoft integration.
roadmap_initiatives.benefits_description: Single customer view; Contact centre efficiency; Marketing automation capability

roadmap_initiatives.description: Azure ML fraud detection replacing legacy rule engine. Real-time scoring via event-driven architecture.
roadmap_initiatives.benefits_description: 40% false positive reduction; 15% improved fraud catch rate; Reduced manual review

roadmap_initiatives.description: BIZA CDR Register integration and Azure-hosted data holder capability for regulatory compliance.
roadmap_initiatives.benefits_description: ACCC CDR compliance; Open banking revenue opportunities

roadmap_initiatives.description: Migration of all DataPower integrations to Azure APIM ahead of IBM support end date.
roadmap_initiatives.benefits_description: Eliminate IBM licensing ($84K pa); Reduce on-premises footprint; Azure-native integration

roadmap_initiatives.description: PoC for AI-native EA platform replacing legacy EA tool. Intake agent, generation agent, Dataverse schema, Power BI dashboard.
roadmap_initiatives.benefits_description: Time-to-first-draft from 4-8 hrs to under 2 hrs; Live estate intelligence; EA tool licence saving $48K pa
